title: report-equity-memo Phase 4 input bundle
description: Documents the 4 JSON files report-equity-memo Phase 4 hands to domain-teams:investing-team. Each JSON is produced by an upstream Layer 1 or Layer 2 step. Schema enforced by tests/integration/test_cross_layer_chains.py::test_phase4_bundle_validates_against_schema.

fetch.description: Phase 1 — data-{country}/scripts/pack.py --pack memo-fetch output. Layer 1 raw arrays + provenance. File: ${TICKER_SAFE}-fetch.json

income_statement.description: Canonical flat arrays: revenue[], net_income[], ebit[]. May include _meta with per-concept fiscal_year_ends + filings_used for US EDGAR audit trail.

_meta.description: Per-concept metadata: fiscal_year_ends, filings_used, per_year_concept. US EDGAR only; absent for yfinance Tier-2 countries.

balance_sheet.description: Canonical flat arrays: total_assets[], total_debt[], cash[].

cash_flow.description: Canonical flat arrays: operating_cash_flow[], capex[], free_cash_flow[].

company_info.description: Optional (present for US/JP/KR/CN via yfinance): regularMarketPrice, marketCap, sharesOutstanding, trailingPE, forwardPE, etc.

current_price.description: Canonical current price. Used by dcf_compute and comps_compute.

regime_card.description: Phase 2 — analysis-macro-regime/scripts/regime_compose.py --input {country}=... output. CountryRegimeCard dataclass for one country (home + optionally US). File: regime-card.json

country.description: ISO 2-letter country code matching the ticker's home country.

confidence.description: Classifier confidence derived from data_quality.missing count.

framework_used.description: Human-readable label for the macro framework (e.g. 'IC + Hedgeye GIP + Fed FIT + 4-tier real-rate + yield curve' for US; 'NDC 五色景氣燈號 + IC overlay' for TW).

native_verdict.description: Country-specific verdict payload. All countries include framework_label as first key. US: ic_quadrant + gip_regime + real_rate_decomposition + yield_curve. TW: signal_color + signal_score + components_9 + ic_quadrant (alias). Others: ic_quadrant_legacy + gip_regime_legacy + country-specific overlays.

ic_quadrant.description: IC quadrant (present for US as primary; present as alias for TW; under ic_quadrant_legacy for JP/KR/CN).

ic_quadrant_legacy.description: IC quadrant alias for backward compat (JP/KR/CN demote IC to legacy).

gip_regime.description: Hedgeye GIP quadrant (US primary; legacy alias for JP/KR/CN).

indicators_used.description: Series codes actually resolved from the regime-pack fixture (e.g. 'ndc.signal-score', 'DGS10', 'T10YIE').

data_quality.description: missing[] list + populated[] list. Drives confidence heuristic.

provenance.description: calibration_doc + calibration_vintage. Ties classifier output to its threshold document.

comps.description: Phase 2.5 — analysis-comps/scripts/comps_compute.py --mode compute output. v2.2.0-b+ has multiples_direct + multiples_compute + divergence + compute_provenance when mode=compute. File: ${TICKER_SAFE}-comps.json

multiples_direct.description: Multiples read directly from the comps-multiples pack (yfinance Tier 2 or primary source). Keys: trailingPE, forwardPE, priceToSales, priceToBook, evEbitda.

multiples_compute.description: Recomputed multiples from memo-fetch financials (trailingPE, priceToSales). Present only in --mode compute. Keys same as multiples_direct.

divergence.description: Per-multiple divergence between direct and compute. alert ∈ {low, medium, high, n/a}. investing-team must surface high alerts.

compute_provenance.description: Per-multiple audit trail: computed (bool), fiscal_year_end, accession_basis[], source_concepts[]. US EDGAR populates accession_basis with 10-K references; non-US countries have empty accession_basis until v2.2.0-l.

statistics.description: Per-multiple descriptive stats across peers (mean, median, std, min, max, n_peers).

anchor_delta.description: Per-multiple premium/discount of anchor vs peer group (pct_vs_mean, pct_vs_median).

ranking.description: All tickers (anchor + peers) ranked by composite multiple score.

dcf.description: Phase 3 — analysis-dcf/scripts/dcf_compute.py output. 3-stage Damodaran DCF with 3x3 sensitivity table. File: ${TICKER_SAFE}-dcf.json

intrinsic_value.description: 3-scenario DCF intrinsic value in the ticker's native currency. Note: the current implementation computes aggregate value (not per-share) for some non-US tickers — investing-team must normalise by shares_outstanding when needed.

assumptions.description: DCF input assumptions derived from fetch.json financials. base_revenue and historical_revenue_cagr are the key chain-wiring indicators.

sensitivity_table.description: 3x3 grid of (growth_rate x discount_rate) scenarios producing per-scenario intrinsic values.

verdict_thresholds.description: Margin-of-safety thresholds: strong_buy (<0.7x), buy (0.7-0.9x), hold (0.9-1.1x), sell (>1.1x).

warnings.description: Non-fatal warnings from dcf_compute (e.g. negative FCF, thin revenue history).

_provenance.description: Provenance metadata. Contains 'layer' and 'framework' (not 'skill') in analysis-dcf output.

skill.description: Present in some callers; not emitted by dcf_compute directly.
